text:
2Volt is the 3rd track on the original soundtrack of the film, Attack on Titan Part 2: Jiyuu no Tsubasa. It is also the 9th track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

The title is a reference to the track TheWeightOfLives. 2V = W, becoming "Wolt", which is the capital letters (TWOL) of TheWeightOfLives jumbled together. The 2 also references the fact it's for the 2nd recap film.

Musical motifs

The track has 1 remix, TWO-lives (it doesn't feature the descending piano notes at 1:19-1:45).

Additionally, the track incorporates 2 motifs from theDOGS: the ostinato at 0:26-0:18, 3:07-3:21 and 3:59-4:12, and the chorus at 4:36-5:25.
